assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-23 contain '## Repository Registry' with a table header row '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and a separator row '|---|---|---|---|' but no data rows following.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 25-29 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', and '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 31-37 contain '## Code Intelligence' with text 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and a Limitations subsection stating 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 5-8 under '### Serena MCP Tools' state: '**Result:** No Serena MCP tools found.' and 'Scanned available MCP tools for any tool names matching `mcp__serena*` or similar patterns. None detected.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 10-13 under '### Atlassian MCP Tools' state: '**Result:** No Atlassian MCP tools found.' and 'None detected.' Lines 16-17 under '## Jira Configuration' state: '**Method:** Manual entry (no Atlassian MCP tools available for auto-discovery).' and 'User provided the following values:' with the three Jira fields.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 8 states: 'User was prompted about continuing without code intelligence. User chose to continue without code intelligence.' Lines 28-29 further confirm: 'User was prompted: "No Serena MCP tools were found. Would you like to continue without code intelligence?"' and 'User response: Continue without code intelligence.'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 32-34 document: 'User was prompted about enabling security triage.' and 'User declined. No Security Configuration section added.' claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after the Code Intelligence/Limitations section at line 37.
